positive: A stylized, vibrant minimalist illustration of a nocturnal cityscape silhouette, featuring soaring bioluminescent flora and stylized geometric skylines. The primary subject is a large, stylized crescent moon framing a trio of abstract mountain peaks. Use an Art Deco aesthetic mixed with vaporwave neon accents. The colors must be deeply saturated jewel tones: electric sapphire blue, magenta, cyan, and lime green, against a deep indigo background. The composition should be perfectly centered and designed to look excellent on a t-shirt print. Clean, hard lines, high contrast, suitable for screen printing, vector graphic quality, perfect symmetry, dramatic volumetric lighting.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, writing, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoonish, sketch, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, faded, gradient shading, poor composition
